material_findings.repair: Adjudication now gates candidate emission on schedule/raw integrity and exact self-test outcomes force integrity violations to NOT_ESTABLISHED.
Authorization now requires INDEPENDENT_WINDOW_TRANSDUCER_V3_MANIFEST_SHA256 and revalidates manifest digest, source hashes, schedule artifacts, self-test, runtime binary hash, and disassembly hash.

material_findings.finding: Independent subcapture sequencing was asserted but not mechanically proven.
material_findings.repair: Raw validation now requires per-component stage sequences and unique stage receipt IDs; mocks cover out-of-order zero-return-code and reused-baseline receipt rejection.

material_findings.finding: Offline closure lacked disassembly and governance-gate receipts.
material_findings.repair: Runtime compile receipts now include objdump-based forbidden-instruction scanning, and self-test/validate receipts include the critic gate with the full gate declared as the clean-tree pre-push requirement.

material_findings.finding: Second re-audit found stage receipt uniqueness was not capture-wide.
material_findings.repair: Raw validation now tracks stage receipt IDs across the entire capture and rejects reuse across trials; cross-trial receipt reuse is an explicit self-test case.

material_findings.finding: Second re-audit found adjudication accepted tampered features with a stale hash.
material_findings.repair: Adjudication now recomputes features_sha256 before evaluating transfer laws and returns NOT_ESTABLISHED on hash mismatch; tampered feature mutation is an explicit regression.
